query:
SELECT 
  emissorNome,
  codigoCetip,
  indexador,
  incentivado,
  CAST(taxaIndicativa AS DECIMAL(10,4)) as taxaIndicativa,
  CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as zspread_bps,
  CAST(spreadIncentivadoSemGrossUp AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as grossUp_bps,
  CAST(durationAnos AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as duration,
  dataVencimento,
  rating
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE incentivado = 1 
  AND spreadIncentivadoSemGrossUp IS NOT NULL
  AND spreadIncentivadoSemGrossUp > 0
  AND zspread IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY grossUp_bps DESC
LIMIT 12;
